'''ây-t-w-b''' ('''kayatweboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:baa|baa]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-t-w-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:baa|baa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-t-w-b
|-
! Lemma
| kayatweboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyatweboko|thiyatweboko]] || [[word:jiyatweboko|jiyatweboko]] || [[word:shiyatweboko|shiyatweboko]] || [[word:kiyatweboko|kiyatweboko]]
|-
